claim: The high-entropy compatibility-tail guard is a real continuity scaffold for wide-cascade states.
Static fallback texture terms risk becoming a crutch unless pressure and density telemetry shape vocabulary.
Raising the high-entropy fallback threshold or changing fallback model selection should be tested as model-capacity behavior.
rationale: Changing model/provider/sampler or the compatibility-tail threshold alters live LLM authority and requires explicit operator approval.
